theme_and_archetype.description: Premium rooftop nightlife experience combining urban luxury, natural greenery, ambient lighting, and modern architecture. Editorial and cinematic feel.

headings.description: Editorial luxury serif for high-end cinematic feel. Use for Hero title and section headers.

body.description: Modern, legible sans-serif for UI elements, menus, form labels, and paragraphs.

layout_and_spacing.philosophy: Cinematic and editorial. Avoid standard center-aligned Bootstrap rows. Use asymmetrical overlapping grids and generous whitespace.

motion.scroll: Smooth scroll using framer-motion or lenis with parallax depth layers on greenery images.
motion.hover_effects: Hover glow borders on cards and buttons. Example: shadow-[0_0_20px_rgba(251,191,36,0.3)] for gold, or green glow.
motion.animations: Subtle floating animations on decorative leaf elements or light flares.

sections.name: Hero
sections.elements: Muted loop autoplay video background without controls. Gradient overlay (`bg-gradient-to-b from-black/40 via-black/20 to-[#0B0F0E]`) to ensure text readability. Bold serif title 'To Be Continued Sky Lounge', sans-serif subtext 'A rooftop escape above Bangalore'. CTAs: 'Reserve Table' (Solid Gold/Green) and 'Explore Experience' (Glass Outline).

sections.name: About
sections.elements: Text left-aligned with drop cap or large typography. Parallax floating greenery images overlapping the text container.

sections.name: Experience
sections.layout: Bento grid or alternating zig-zag cards.
sections.elements: Categories: Rooftop dining, DJ nights, cocktails, sunset lounge, private tables. Glassmorphism cards with hover glow borders (Gold/Green transitions).

sections.name: Menu
sections.elements: Placeholder food/cocktail items. Image hover zoom (scale-105 on group-hover) wrapped in overflow-hidden rounded containers.

sections.name: Gallery
sections.elements: Click-to-expand lightbox functionality. Soft zoom on hover. Scroll reveal animations (Framer Motion).

sections.name: Reservation
sections.layout: Minimalist centered card layout in glassmorphism container.
sections.elements: Display-only luxury booking form (Date, Time, Guests). Custom styled inputs matching glassmorphism theme. No backend integration needed.

sections.name: Footer
sections.elements: Bangalore address: 5th Floor, Berry's Hotel, Marathahalli-Sarjapur ORR, Kadubeesanahalli, Bengaluru 560103. Phone: +917624959444. Instagram: @tbc.skylounge. Links with subtle hover glow.

media_assets.instructions_to_main_agent: CRITICAL: Check the workspace for real venue assets (4 rooftop interior photos, 1 cinematic video clip). If found, USE THEM directly. The URLs below are FALLBACKS only.

hero_video.notes: Replace with the provided cinematic video clip.

images.description: Cozy outdoor seating with warm lighting
Elegant wooden tables and chairs set
A cocktail with fruit slice on a marble table
Smoked cocktail with lime under glass dome
DJ night under canopy at rooftop

component_instructions.forms: Use highly customized forms. Strip default borders, apply glassmorphism: `bg-white/5 border-white/10 text-white placeholder:text-white/40 focus:border-[#22C55E]`.
component_instructions.buttons: Primary: `bg-[#22C55E] text-[#0B0F0E] hover:bg-[#22C55E]/90 hover:shadow-[0_0_20px_rgba(34,197,94,0.4)]`. Secondary: `bg-white/[0.04] border border-white/20 text-white hover:bg-white/10`.
component_instructions.icons: Use lucide-react for minimal, elegant line icons.
component_instructions.gallery_lightbox: Implement with Framer Motion `AnimatePresence` or similar to feel native and premium. Must not feel like a cheap plugin.

accessibility.contrast: Must have gradient overlays under text resting on background videos/images.
accessibility.focus: All interactive elements must use focus-visible states highlighting with the accent green (#22C55E) or gold (#FBBF24).
